symbols.name: Message
symbols.description: Message: the minimal primitive

symbols.name: Node
symbols.description: Unified Node interface

symbols.name: NodeConfig
symbols.description: Configuration for creating a node

symbols.name: Processor
symbols.description: Processor function

symbols.name: ReadInterface
symbols.description: Read interface - subset of node capabilities for reading state

symbols.name: ReceiveResult
symbols.description: Result of a receive operation

symbols.name: Validator
symbols.signature: type Validator<D> = (msg: Message<D>, read: (uri: string) => Promise<ReadResult<T>>) => Promise<unknown>
symbols.description: Validator function

symbols.name: all
symbols.description: Parallel validator composition All validators must pass (runs in parallel)

symbols.name: any
symbols.description: Any-match validator composition First validator to pass wins, returns error only if all fail

symbols.name: firstMatch
symbols.description: First-match reader composition Try readers until one succeeds

symbols.name: parallel
symbols.description: Parallel processor composition Run processors/receivers in parallel, at least one must succeed

symbols.name: pipeline
symbols.description: Pipeline processor composition Run processors in sequence, all must succeed

symbols.name: seq
symbols.description: Sequential validator composition Runs validators in order, stops at first failure

symbols.name: accept
symbols.description: Pass-through validator Always accepts the message (useful for open/public programs)

symbols.name: format
symbols.signature: function format<D>(checkFn: (msg: Message<D>) => boolean | string): Validator<D>
symbols.description: Format validator Validates the structure of message data using a check function

symbols.name: msgSchema
symbols.description: Message schema validator Routes validation based on data shape: - If data IS MessageData: validates the envelope URI AND each output against schema - If data is NOT MessageData: validates as a plain message against schema

symbols.name: reject
symbols.description: Reject validator Always rejects the message with an optional message

symbols.name: requireFields
symbols.description: Require fields validator Validates that the message data contains specific fields

symbols.name: schema
symbols.description: Schema validator Per-program validation using the existing Schema type

symbols.name: uriPattern
symbols.description: URI pattern validator Validates that the message URI matches a regex pattern

symbols.name: emit
symbols.signature: function emit<D>(callback: (msg: Message<D>) => Promise<void> | void): Processor<D>
symbols.description: Emit processor Calls a callback function with the message (for events, logging, etc.)

symbols.name: log
symbols.description: Log processor Logs the message (for debugging)

symbols.name: noop
symbols.description: Noop processor Does nothing, always succeeds

symbols.name: when
symbols.signature: function when<D>(condition: (msg: Message<D>) => boolean | Promise<boolean>, processor: Processor<D>): Processor<D>
symbols.description: Conditional processor Only processes if the condition is met

symbols.name: createValidatedClient
symbols.description: Create a FunctionalClient that validates before writing.

symbols.name: createNode
symbols.description: Create a unified node
